/** * @fileoverview Types for this package. */ import type { ConfigObject } from "@eslint/core"; /** * Infinite array type. */ export type InfiniteArray<T> = T | InfiniteArray<T>[]; /** * The type of array element in the `extends` property after flattening. */ export type SimpleExtendsElement = string | ConfigObject; /** * The type of array element in the `extends` property before flattening. */ export type ExtendsElement = SimpleExtendsElement | InfiniteArray<ConfigObject>; /** * Config with extends. Valid only inside of `defineConfig()`. */ export interface ConfigWithExtends extends ConfigObject { extends?: ExtendsElement[]; } export type ConfigWithExtendsArray = InfiniteArray<ConfigWithExtends>[];
